slides.title: Adding Methods 🔧
Methods Demo 🎬

quizData.question: Why must methods include 'self' as the first parameter?

options.text: To access the object's own attributes and methods

quizData.explanation: 'self' gives methods access to the specific object's attributes and other methods.

quizData.question: When calling obj.method(), do you pass 'self'?
quizData.explanation: Python automatically passes the object as 'self' — you never include it in the call.
